_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to communicate with Sr Leaders of an Org. to ensure shared responsibility for supporting Org. mission/business functions using external providers of systems, services and apps receives visibility and is elevated to the appropriate decision_x0002_making authorities.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to serve as an effective bridge between business stakeholders who generate and consume data and technical stakeholders who store and process it.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-A-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-004 (AB, cosine: 0.456), LS-T-003 (LS, cosine: 0.450).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.594). Shared vocabulary: [ability, business]. DCWF-only terms [appropriate, apps, authorities, communicate, decision_x0002_making, elevated] vs WIDAI-only terms [bridge, consume, data, effective, generate, process] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.848 (P=0.834, R=0.862). R exceeds P by 0.028 — the WIDAI KSA's 23 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 36 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Ability to communicate with Sr Leaders of an Org. to ensure shared responsibilit" and "Ability to serve as an effective bridge between business stakeholders who genera" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.457 < STS 0.594 (gap -0.137). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [appropriate, apps, authorities] and [bridge, consume, data] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.9%. Shared tokens: [ability, business]. DCWF-only: [appropriate, apps, authorities, communicate, decision_x0002_making, elevated]. WIDAI-only: [bridge, consume, data, effective, generate, process].
